description: Style Note If you're looking for a sport-inspired, casual tee which won't let you down in either style or performance, then your search is over! This T-shirt from nike has a cool race track print with a retro vibe, just what you need to perfect your effortlessly fashionable casual look. Product Details Grey T-shirt with print, round neck, short sleeves and branding on sleeve Material and Care100% cotton Machine wash cold with like colours Do not dry clean or bleach Tumble dry low Warm iron
